name: Charter Hall Social Infrastructure Reit
analysis: CQE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.6900, stop A$2.4601, target A$3.0688 (1.65:1) — then trail it.
